languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

languages.text: "Ты ведешь себя слишком самоуверенно для того, кто сам по уши в ереси, техножрец".
"You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."
languages.original_text: "Ты ведешь себя слишком самоуверенно для того, кто сам по уши в ереси, техножрец".

traits.locale_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."
"You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."
"You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

languages.text: «Tiene mucha confianza para estar metido hasta el cuello en la herejía, tecnosacerdote».
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene mucha confianza para estar metido hasta el cuello en la herejía, tecnosacerdote».

languages.text: 「異端にどっぷり浸かった当人にしては、ずいぶんと自信があるじゃないか、技術司祭」
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: 「異端にどっぷり浸かった当人にしては、ずいぶんと自信があるじゃないか、技術司祭」

languages.text: “一个深陷异端泥潭的人，居然还如此自信，真是令人惊叹，技术神甫。”
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: “一个深陷异端泥潭的人，居然还如此自信，真是令人惊叹，技术神甫。”

languages.text: "Ihr seid erstaunlich selbstbewusst für jemanden, der bis zum Hals in Ketzerei steckt, Techpriester."
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid erstaunlich selbstbewusst für jemanden, der bis zum Hals in Ketzerei steckt, Techpriester."

languages.text: « Vous êtes très confiant pour quelqu'un qui baigne dans l'hérésie jusqu'au cou, technoprêtre. »
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes très confiant pour quelqu'un qui baigne dans l'hérésie jusqu'au cou, technoprêtre. »

languages.text: "Kendisinin de gırtlağına kadar kâfirliğe battığını düşünürsek kendine çok güveniyorsun Tekno Rahip."
languages.original_text: "You're awfully confident for someone who is up to his ears in heresy himself, Tech-Priest."

traits.locale_text: "Kendisinin de gırtlağına kadar kâfirliğe battığını düşünürsek kendine çok güveniyorsun Tekno Rahip."
